name: Roasted Vegetable Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1 small Eggplant, thinly sliced into rounds
1 Red bell pepper, cored, seeded and thinly sliced
1/4 cup Sour cream, non-fat - Or - non-fat plain yogurt
1 French bread baguette, 16 inch-long, split length-wise, cut into 4 sections
1 bn Watercress, washed, large-stem removed, about 2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 450 degrees.
2. In a large roasting pan, toss eggplant, zucchini, yellow squash and red pepper slices with oil and garlic. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Roast vegetables, stirring occasionally, until tender and starting to brown, 30 to 35 minutes. Let cool.
4. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, whisk together sour cream or yogurt, mayonnaise, basil and lemon juice. Season with salt and pepper; reserve in refrigerator.
5. Spread mayonnaise mixture on both bread halves and arrange watercress on bottom layer.
6. Top with vegetable mixture and bread tops.
